title: The Return of Sophie Lang
writer: Frederick Irving Anderson, Brian Marlow, Patterson McNutt
actors: Gertrude Michael, Guy Standing, Ray Milland
plot: In order to give up her life of crime and go straight, renowned jewel thief Sophie Lang fakes her own death and retires to London. She soon finds a job as a companion to a wealthy old lady who is also a jewel collector. One day he...
